---
title: Phase speed spectra and the recent poleward shift of Southern Hemisphere surface
  westerlies
pagetitle: 2007-11-1-Chen2007b - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2007
author: Gang Chen and Isaac M. Held
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 34, L21805, doi:10.1029/2007GL031200.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen and Isaac M. Held, 2007: Phase speed spectra and
  the recent poleward shift of Southern Hemisphere surface westerlies, <i>Geophysical
  Research Letters</i>, 34, L21805, doi:10.1029/2007GL031200.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2007GL031200
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Phase speed spectra and the recent poleward shift of Southern Hemisphere surface westerlies

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2007*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen and Isaac M. Held, 2007: Phase speed spectra and the recent poleward shift of Southern Hemisphere surface westerlies, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 34, L21805, doi:10.1029/2007GL031200.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2007GL031200){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
